description_long: This is an octagonal above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a blue inner lining, designed for outdoor use. The jacuzzi features a set of metal handrails and a wooden ladder at the front for easy entry and exit. Around the perimeter, the wooden panels are reinforced with dark brackets at each corner, giving it a sturdy and decorative appearance. An orange filtration or pump unit is attached to the side, connected by visible hoses, indicating a functional water circulation system. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the tub, with the surface reflecting the blue of the lining. The jacuzzi is placed on a concrete or stone base, providing stability and separation from the ground.
description: An octagonal wooden above-ground jacuzzi with a blue interior, metal handrails, a wooden ladder, and an attached orange filtration unit. The water is nearly full, and the jacuzzi sits on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden ladder and metal handrails leading into the jacuzzi, with the water surface clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange filtration unit and a partially open wooden access panel, with the handrails visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the filtration unit and its connection to the jacuzzi, with the handrails at the far side.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the filtration unit and the wooden ladder, as well as the open access panel on the side.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water level close to the top edge
